# coolify_resource_action (Resource)

Triggers a start, stop, or restart action on a Coolify application, database, or service. Changing the `triggers` map forces the action to run again.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Start a database
resource "coolify_resource_action" "start_db" {
  resource_uuid = coolify_database_postgresql.main.uuid
  resource_type = "database"
  action        = "start"
}

# Restart an application whenever the image tag changes
resource "coolify_resource_action" "restart_app" {
  resource_uuid = coolify_application.api.uuid
  resource_type = "application"
  action        = "restart"

  triggers = {
    image_tag = var.image_tag
  }
}

# Stop a service
resource "coolify_resource_action" "stop_svc" {
  resource_uuid = coolify_service.monitoring.uuid
  resource_type = "service"
  action        = "stop"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) The action to perform. Must be one of: `start`, `stop`, `restart`.
- `resource_type` (String) The type of the target resource. Must be one of: `application`, `database`, `service`.
- `resource_uuid` (String) The UUID of the target resource (application, database, or service).

### Optional

- `triggers` (Map of String) An arbitrary map of values that, when changed, forces the action to run again.
